violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen by sandwich bar was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

The 2-door reach-in refrigerator was observed held at an ambient temperature of 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, food items had been loaded into unit less than 4 hours prior to the time of inspection. Food items were taken from walk-in cooler and were left out during food processing and then loaded in unit for lunch service. Food items were moved back into walk-in cooler for cold holding. Establishment is not to use unit until it is repaired or replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on milk cooler #2 by cash registers. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2026

The 2-door reach-in refrigerator located by the walk-in cooler was observed unable to maintain 41 degrees Fahrenheit or less and is not in good repair. Establishment is not to use equipment until unit is repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

The door of the walk-in cooler is not in good repair. Duct tape observed to be holding metal in place. Door must be repaired using materials that are smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items (2-door reach-in freezer and 1-door got milk refrigerator) were observed in the kitchen prep area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Establishment shall repair, replace, or remove non-functional equipment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The door of the walk-in cooler is not in good repair. Duct tape observed to be holding metal in place. Door must be repaired using materials that are smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024

Floor in the walk-in cooler (grout below tile surface) and ceiling tiles in the restroom and dishwasher area (stained due to probable leak) observed in poor repair. Floor is to be repaired, and ceiling tiles replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items (2-door reach-in freezer and 1-door got milk refrigerator) were observed in the kitchen prep area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Establishment shall repair, replace, or remove non-functional equipment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The door of the walk-in cooler is not in good repair. Duct tape observed to be holding metal in place. Door must be repaired using materials that are smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024

Floor in the walk-in cooler (grout below tile surface) and ceiling tiles in the restroom and dishwasher area (stained due to probable leak) observed in poor repair. Floor is to be repaired and ceiling tiles replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

Ground Beef was observed held at 126 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food item had been placed into hot hold unit less than 1 hour prior to inspection. Food item was placed into oven and reheated to 176 degrees Fahrenheit prior to being placed back into hot holding unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024

The door of the walk-in cooler is not in good repair. Duct tape observed to be holding metal in place. Door must be repaired using materials that are smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024

Floor in the walk-in cooler (grout below tile surface) and ceiling tiles in the restroom and dishwasher area (stained due to probable leak) observed in poor repair. Floor is to be repaired and ceiling tiles replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The dishwasher is poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Per PIC, dishwasher became in-operational, and staff is using 3-bay sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize dishes. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The door of the walk-in cooler is not in good repair. Duct tape observed to be holding metal in place. Door must be repaired using materials that are smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of milk cold hold #2 (deli area) and walk-in cooler door gasket, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
Faucet at the sanitizing bay of the 3-bay sink observed to be dripping/leaking. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Floor in the walk-in cooler (grout below tile surface) and ceiling tiles in the restroom and dishwasher area (stained due to probable leak) observed in poor repair. Floor is to be repaired and ceiling tiles replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back receiving area, and doors to the outside, located in the front main entrance, observed not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023

The walls in the slicer area, floor tiles in the kitchen, floor tiles in the walk-in cooler, ceiling tiles in the employee's bathroom, and ceiling tiles in the dishwashing area observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) observed with food residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. -Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the slicer during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2023

-Foul smell/odor observed in the 3 bay sink area. Per interview of staff, grease trap needs to be cleaned. Grease trap shall be cleaned and maintained. 5-403.12 Other Liquid Wastes and Rainwater. Condensate drainage and other nonSEWAGE liquids and rainwater shall be drained from point of discharge to disposal according to LAW. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023

The walls/floors in the walk-in cooler, ceiling in the walk-in freezer, and ceiling tiles in the dishwashing area observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Tile grout observed in the walk-in cooler and walls observed rusted and chipped. Ceiling in the walk-in freezer observed with peeled/chipped coating. -Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. Floors/walls/ceiling shall be smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
